start.text: 🦷 RULE — GUMS! For the rest of this rule, nobody is allowed to smile or laugh while showing their teeth. Caught with teeth showing = {sip}.

end.text: 🦷 RULE OVER — GUMS! You may now smile freely without penalty. Teeth are back.

start.text: 🪨 RULE — CAVEMEN! Big words are banned. Short words only. Long word = {sip}.

end.text: 🪨 RULE OVER — CAVEMEN! Vocabulary restored. Use all the syllables you like.

start.text: 🎵 RULE — KESHA! You must repeat the last word of every sentence you say. Every sentence. Forget to repeat? Drink {sip}.

end.text: 🎵 RULE OVER — KESHA! No more double words. The echo has left the building.

start.text: 👑 RULE — ROYALTY! No speaking in the first person. No "I", "me" or "my" — use your name instead. Offenders drink {sip}.

end.text: 👑 RULE OVER — ROYALTY! First person is restored. You are no longer royalty.

start.text: 💕 RULE — ROMANTIC! Every time you tell someone to drink, you must hold their chin, look them in the eyes, and tell them how many sips they owe you. Skip the ceremony = {sip}.

end.text: 💕 RULE OVER — ROMANTIC! The romance is over. You may drink-order without eye contact again.

start.text: ☝️ RULE — RUDE! No using anyone's name. Point at people when addressing them instead. Use a name = {sip}.

end.text: ☝️ RULE OVER — RUDE! Pointing is over. Names are permitted again.

start.text: 🥐 RULE — HON HON! Zut alors! Everyone must speak in a French accent until further notice. Drop ze accent = {sip}, non?

end.text: 🥐 RULE OVER — HON HON! C'est fini. English accents resume. Merci beaucoup.

start.text: 🤜 RULE — MY MAN! If you and another player drink at exactly the same time, you must immediately dap up and say "My man!" Fail to do so = {sip}.

end.text: 🤜 RULE OVER — MY MAN! Simultaneous drinking may now go unacknowledged.

start.text: 🕵️ RULE — SECRET SERVICE! {player1}, you are the President. At any moment you may put a finger to your ear — at which point EVERYONE must leap up and shout "MR PRESIDENT!" Last one to do so drinks {medium}.

end.text: 🕵️ RULE OVER — SECRET SERVICE! The President's detail stands down. No more drills.

start.text: 🤬 RULE — FIDDLESTICKS! No swearing. Each slip costs {sip}. Watch your bloody mouth.

end.text: 🤬 RULE OVER — FIDDLESTICKS! Profanity amnesty. Swear freely once more.

start.text: 🫂 RULE — THERE THERE! Every time a player takes a sip, the person to their right must rub their back and whisper "there, there" until they're done. Neglect your duty = {sip}.

end.text: 🫂 RULE OVER — THERE THERE! Back-rubbing duty is lifted. Drink in peace.

start.text: 🧍 RULE — ON YOUR FEET! Everyone must stand up. Sit down = {sip}.

end.text: 🧍 RULE OVER — ON YOUR FEET! You may sit. Your legs have earned it.

start.text: 😇 RULE — NICE GUY! Every time you tell someone to drink, you must pay them a genuine compliment first. Skip it = drink yourself.

end.text: 😇 RULE OVER — NICE GUY! Compliments are optional again. Don't let that stop you.

start.text: 💩 RULE — SHEET, BEETCH! Every sentence must start with "shit" and end with "bitch." No exceptions. Forget either word = {sip}.

end.text: 💩 RULE OVER — SHEET, BEETCH! Sentence structure returns to normal.

start.text: 💑 RULE — SOULMATES! {player1}, you and {player2} are now bonded. Every time {player2} drinks, so do you — and vice versa. No exceptions.

end.text: 💑 RULE OVER — SOULMATES! The bond is broken. Drink independently once more.

start.text: #️⃣ RULE — INSTA! Every sentence must start with the word "hashtag." Forget it = {sip}.

end.text: #️⃣ RULE OVER — INSTA! Hashtags are gone. Speak like a normal person again.

start.text: 🏴‍☠️ RULE — ARRRGH! Ye be pirates now, the lot of ye. Speak like a sea dog or walk the plank ({sip}).

end.text: 🏴‍☠️ RULE OVER — ARRRGH! Landlubber speech is restored. Sail on.

start.text: 🔇 RULE — ONE AT A TIME! If you speak at the same time as another player, drink {sip}. Talk over each other and it's {small}.

end.text: 🔇 RULE OVER — ONE AT A TIME! Talk freely. Chaos is permitted again.

start.text: 😶 RULE — TOO SHY! No eye contact allowed. Catch someone's gaze = {sip} each.

end.text: 😶 RULE OVER — TOO SHY! Eye contact amnesty. Look at each other again.

start.text: 🎩 RULE — BERTIE! You must address every player as "[Name], old chap." Drop the "old chap" = {sip}.

end.text: 🎩 RULE OVER — BERTIE! Old chap is retired. First names only once more.

start.text: 🔍 RULE — HOLMES! Surnames only. No first names — use last names to address everyone. Get it wrong = {sip}. (If you don't know someone's last name, ask — that's part of the fun.)

end.text: 🔍 RULE OVER — HOLMES! First names resume. Elementary.

start.text: 🤲 RULE — ITCHY! You may not touch any part of your own body with your hands until this rule ends. Caught scratching = {sip}.

end.text: 🤲 RULE OVER — ITCHY! Scratch away. Your hands are yours again.

start.text: 🙌 RULE — GIVE US A HAND! No using your hands to drink. Find another way or take {sip} penalty.

end.text: 🙌 RULE OVER — GIVE US A HAND! Hands may touch glasses again. Thank goodness.

start.text: ❓ RULE — QUESTION MASTER! {player1}, you are the Question Master. Anyone who answers a question you ask (directly or casually) must take {medium}. Use your power wisely.

end.text: ❓ RULE OVER — QUESTION MASTER! {player1}'s powers are revoked. Answer questions freely.

start.text: 🌍 RULE — FOREIGN AFFAIRS! {player1}, you are the Minister of Foreign Affairs. You are the ONLY person allowed to speak to anyone not currently playing. All external comms go through you.

end.text: 🌍 RULE OVER — FOREIGN AFFAIRS! The Ministry is dissolved. Talk to outsiders freely.

start.text: ⚡ RULE — LIGHTNING! Whenever you're told to drink, you get to make another player drink one less than you. Chain reactions are allowed.

end.text: ⚡ RULE OVER — LIGHTNING! Lightning chains are broken. Drink your own drinks.

start.text: 📻 RULE — RADIO! Every sentence must end with the word "over." Forget it = {sip}. Over.

end.text: 📻 RULE OVER — RADIO! You no longer need to say over. Over and out.

start.text: 🌌 RULE — GREEN I AM! Talk like Yoda you must. Normal word order = {sip}.

end.text: 🌌 RULE OVER — GREEN I AM! Normal grammar returns. Yoda speaks no more.

start.text: 👗 RULE — SWAP! {player1} and {player2}, swap one item of clothing right now. You're wearing it until this rule ends. Refuse = {large}.

end.text: 👗 RULE OVER — SWAP! Return the borrowed threads. You can stop pretending you suit that.
